author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
DELTARUNE Chapter 5 – Launch Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
Play DELTARUNE Chapter 5 now on Nintendo Switch 2 and Nintendo Switch: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/deltarune-switch-2/?utm_source=SW&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=P1021-01&utm_id=P1021-01 

Join Kris, Susie, and Ralsei as they continue their journey to seal the Dark Fountains that threaten the world. Fight or spare your way through action-packed battles alongside an endearing cast of new and familiar characters in this epic role-playing adventure that serves as the parallel story to UNDERTALE. 

Don't have DELTARUNE yet? It's 20% off on Nintendo Switch 2 and Nintendo Switch until July 10, 2026! 

#DELTARUNE #Chapter5 

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
Make New Memories with Nintendo Classics
Make new memories and share your favorite classic games.  With a Nintendo Switch Online + Expansion Pack membership, you can speedrun through gaming history with Nintendo Classics, a library of over 270 titles from the Nintendo GameCube™ (exclusive to Nintendo Switch™ 2), Game Boy™ Advance, Nintendo 64™, and Virtual Boy™ systems, as well as Super NES™, Game Boy, and NES™. You also get access to a selection of classic SEGA Genesis games as well.  Many of these games also include fun features like online play and rewind so you can retry the tough parts. 

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s
